name: Harry's Pharmacy
description:
As you enter the room, you are overcome by the smell of incense.  In the
background, you can faintly hear the singing of religious ballads.  As you walk
towards the counter, you realize you will have to deal with a Hare Krishna
(almost as bad as those guys who go door to door).  A small price to pay for
the goods you may obtain here.  The entrance to the Clerics' Guild is to the
west.  Broadway is to the east.
